name: claude-anti-mem
description: A rap sheet for Claude — logs hallucinations, overkill, and wrong assumptions; consults the log before future responses.

plugins.name: claude-anti-mem
plugins.description: Two skills that work as a pair: anti-mem-collector (logs Claude's failures to a persistent markdown rap sheet when you correct it) and anti-mem-checker (consults the rap sheet before Claude commits to a response, course-correcting away from logged failure patterns).
